title: Keep seven-planet traditional conditions separate from modern rulerships

positions.summary: Apply domicile, detriment, exaltation, and fall tables only to the seven traditional planets.

sources.locator: Book I planetary houses and exaltations

positions.summary: Modern rulership assignments for Uranus, Neptune, and Pluto are a separate optional lineage and are not computed here.

default_policy.rationale: The selected historical table is internally coherent and does not require silently mixing later outer-planet assignments.

user_disclosure: Traditional conditions are reported only for Sun, Moon, Mercury, Venus, Mars, Jupiter, and Saturn; no modern outer-planet rulerships are inferred.
